Connected CAFM  ·  Integrations facilio.

Modernize FM operations
without rebuilding your tech stack.

Switching to Facilio means one new centre of operations — not a full rebuild. Your ERP, BMS, and billing systems stay exactly where they are. Facilio connects to all of them, no matter where your data lives.

Legacy CAFM vs. Connected CAFM
Legacy CAFM stores the work.
Facilio connects it across your ecosystem.
Legacy CAFM
Facilio — Connected CAFM
Work orders, costs, and asset data locked inside CAFM — ERP, finance, and BMS never see it automatically
Every system handoff is manual — teams re-enter data, reconcile spreadsheets, chase updates
New integrations need custom dev or middleware that breaks whenever something changes
Asset and maintenance history scattered across disconnected systems with no single source of truth
Integration projects take months and break with every system or vendor update
Bi-directional sync — completed work flows directly to ERP, finance, and BMS without anyone sending a report
One action in Facilio triggers all downstream updates — zero re-entry, zero lag
REST APIs, ETL, SQL, and BMS protocols — connects modern and legacy systems without replacing anything
Full asset history synced and searchable from one connected platform across every site
Prebuilt connectors go live in 2–4 weeks — no disruption to existing operations
